# Medical Q&A Application - Setup Instructions

## ✅ Completed Steps
- [x] Verify copilot-instructions.md created in .github directory
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Create all source files and configuration

## ⏳ Remaining Steps
- [ ] Install Node.js (if not already installed)
- [ ] Install Dependencies (`npm install`)
- [ ] Configure Environment Variables (`.env`)
- [ ] Configure API credentials
- [ ] Launch the Project (`npm run dev`)

## Project Overview
Medical Q&A application with Node.js/Express, OpenAI integration, and email reporting system for vaccine-related questions.

## 📋 What Was Created
- Express.js server with CORS support
- OpenAI integration for medical Q&A
- Nodemailer email reporting system
- RESTful API endpoints
- Complete documentation and setup guide

## ⚠️ Important: Node.js Required
Node.js must be installed before proceeding. Download from: https://nodejs.org/

## Next Steps
1. Install Node.js (LTS version)
2. Run: `npm install` 
3. Configure `.env` file with your API keys
4. Run: `npm run dev`

See SETUP_GUIDE.md for detailed instructions.
